### Forsaken Resources | itprofessor.cloud

Each tile shows confirmed forsaken count. Resources only appear here when they have no active association.

💲 marks resource types that generate charges when forsaken.
💲 This sign indicates the resource costs money even when forsaken.

content.query:
resources
| where type =~ 'microsoft.web/serverfarms'
| where resourceGroup in~ ({ResourceGroup:value})
| where properties.numberOfSites == 0
| summarize count_ = count() by type
| extend count_ = iff(count_ == 0, 0, count_)
| union (datatable(type:string, count_:long) ["microsoft.web/serverfarms", 0])
| summarize total_count = max(count_) by type

Resources
| where type =~ 'microsoft.compute/availabilitysets'
| where resourceGroup in~ ({ResourceGroup:value})
| where properties.virtualMachines == "[]"
| where not(name endswith '-asr')
| summarize count_ = count() by type
| extend count_ = iff(count_ == 0, 0, count_)
| union (datatable(type:string, count_:long) ["microsoft.compute/availabilitysets", 0])
| summarize total_count = max(count_) by type

Resources
| where type =~ 'microsoft.compute/disks'
| where resourceGroup in~ ({ResourceGroup:value})
| extend diskState = tostring(properties.diskState)
| where (managedBy == "" and diskState != 'ActiveSAS') or (diskState == 'Unattached' and diskState != 'ActiveSAS')
| where not(name endswith "-ASRReplica" or name startswith "ms-asr-" or name startswith "asrseeddisk-")
| where (tags !contains "kubernetes.io-created-for-pvc") and tags !contains "ASR-ReplicaDisk" and tags !contains "asrseeddisk" and tags !contains "RSVaultBackup"
| summarize count_ = count() by type
| extend count_ = iff(count_ == 0, 0, count_)
| union (datatable(type:string, count_:long) ["microsoft.compute/disks", 0])
| summarize total_count = max(count_) by type

resources
| where type =~ 'microsoft.sql/servers/elasticpools'
| where resourceGroup in~ ({ResourceGroup:value})
| project elasticPoolId = tolower(id), Resource = id, type
| join kind=leftouter (resources
| where type =~ 'microsoft.sql/servers/databases'
| project id, properties
| extend elasticPoolId = tolower(properties.elasticPoolId)) on elasticPoolId
| summarize databaseCount = countif(id != '') by Resource, type
| where databaseCount == 0
| project-away databaseCount
| summarize count_ = count() by type
| extend count_ = iff(count_ == 0, 0, count_)
| union (datatable(type:string, count_:long) ["microsoft.sql/servers/elasticpools", 0])
| summarize total_count = max(count_) by type

Resources
| where type =~ 'microsoft.network/publicipaddresses'
| where resourceGroup in~ ({ResourceGroup:value})
| where properties.ipConfiguration == "" and properties.natGateway == "" and properties.publicIPPrefix == ""
| summarize count_ = count() by type
| extend count_ = iff(count_ == 0, 0, count_)
| union (datatable(type:string, count_:long) ["microsoft.network/publicipaddresses", 0])
| summarize total_count = max(count_) by type

Resources
| where type =~ 'microsoft.network/networkinterfaces'
| where resourceGroup in~ ({ResourceGroup:value})
| where isnull(properties.privateEndpoint)
| where isnull(properties.privateLinkService)
| where properties.hostedWorkloads == "[]"
| where properties !has 'virtualmachine'
| summarize count_ = count() by type
| extend count_ = iff(count_ == 0, 0, count_)
| union (datatable(type:string, count_:long) ["microsoft.network/networkinterfaces", 0])
| summarize total_count = max(count_) by type

Resources
| where type =~ 'microsoft.network/networksecuritygroups' and isnull(properties.networkInterfaces) and isnull(properties.subnets)
| where resourceGroup in~ ({ResourceGroup:value})
| summarize count_ = count() by type
| extend count_ = iff(count_ == 0, 0, count_)
| union (datatable(type:string, count_:long) ["microsoft.network/networksecuritygroups", 0])
| summarize total_count = max(count_) by type

resources
| where type =~ 'microsoft.network/routetables'
| where resourceGroup in~ ({ResourceGroup:value})
| where isnull(properties.subnets)
| summarize count_ = count() by type
| extend count_ = iff(count_ == 0, 0, count_)
| union (datatable(type:string, count_:long) ["microsoft.network/routetables", 0])
| summarize total_count = max(count_) by type

resources
| where type =~ 'microsoft.network/loadbalancers'
| where resourceGroup in~ ({ResourceGroup:value})
| where properties.backendAddressPools == "[]" and properties.inboundNatRules == "[]" and properties.outboundRules == "[]"
| summarize count_ = count() by type
| extend count_ = iff(count_ == 0, 0, count_)
| union (datatable(type:string, count_:long) ["microsoft.network/loadbalancers", 0])
| summarize total_count = max(count_) by type

resources
| where type =~ 'microsoft.network/frontdoorwebapplicationfirewallpolicies'
| where resourceGroup in~ ({ResourceGroup:value})
| where properties.securityPolicyLinks== "[]"
| summarize count_ = count() by type
| extend count_ = iff(count_ == 0, 0, count_)
| union (datatable(type:string, count_:long) ["microsoft.network/frontdoorwebapplicationfirewallpolicies", 0])
| summarize total_count = max(count_) by type

resources
| where type =~ 'microsoft.network/trafficmanagerprofiles'
| where resourceGroup in~ ({ResourceGroup:value})
| where properties.endpoints == "[]"
| summarize count_ = count() by type
| extend count_ = iff(count_ == 0, 0, count_)
| union (datatable(type:string, count_:long) ["microsoft.network/trafficmanagerprofiles", 0])
| summarize total_count = max(count_) by type

resources
| where type =~ 'microsoft.network/applicationgateways'
| where resourceGroup in~ ({ResourceGroup:value})
| extend AppGwId = tostring(id)
| join (
    resources
    | where type =~ 'microsoft.network/applicationgateways'
    | mvexpand backendPools = properties.backendAddressPools
    | extend backendIPCount = array_length(backendPools.properties.backendIPConfigurations)
    | extend backendAddressesCount = array_length(backendPools.properties.backendAddresses)
    | extend AppGwId = tostring(id)
    | summarize backendIPCount = sum(backendIPCount), backendAddressesCount = sum(backendAddressesCount) by AppGwId

| where (backendIPCount == 0 or isempty(backendIPCount)) and (backendAddressesCount == 0 or isempty(backendAddressesCount))
| summarize count_ = count() by type
| extend count_ = iff(count_ == 0, 0, count_)
| union (datatable(type:string, count_:long) ["microsoft.network/applicationgateways", 0])
| summarize total_count = max(count_) by type

resources
| where type =~ 'microsoft.network/virtualnetworks'
| where resourceGroup in~ ({ResourceGroup:value})
| where properties.subnets == "[]"
| summarize count_ = count() by type
| extend count_ = iff(count_ == 0, 0, count_)
| union (datatable(type:string, count_:long) ["microsoft.network/virtualnetworks", 0])
| summarize total_count = max(count_) by type

resources
| where type =~ 'microsoft.network/natgateways'
| where resourceGroup in~ ({ResourceGroup:value})
| where isnull(properties.subnets)
| summarize count_ = count() by type
| extend count_ = iff(count_ == 0, 0, count_)
| union (datatable(type:string, count_:long) ["microsoft.network/natgateways", 0])

resources
| where type =~ 'microsoft.network/ipgroups'
| where resourceGroup in~ ({ResourceGroup:value})
| where properties.firewalls == "[]" and properties.firewallPolicies == "[]"
| summarize count_ = count() by type
| extend count_ = iff(count_ == 0, 0, count_)
| union (datatable(type:string, count_:long) ["microsoft.network/ipgroups", 0])
| summarize total_count = max(count_) by type

resources
| where type =~ 'microsoft.network/privatednszones'
| where resourceGroup in~ ({ResourceGroup:value})
| where properties.numberOfVirtualNetworkLinks == 0
| summarize count_ = count() by type
| extend count_ = iff(count_ == 0, 0, count_)
| union (datatable(type:string, count_:long) ["microsoft.network/privatednszones", 0])
| summarize total_count = max(count_) by type

resources
| where type =~ 'microsoft.network/privateendpoints'
| where resourceGroup in~ ({ResourceGroup:value})
| extend connection = iff(array_length(properties.manualPrivateLinkServiceConnections) > 0, properties.manualPrivateLinkServiceConnections[0], properties.privateLinkServiceConnections[0])
| extend stateEnum = tostring(connection.properties.privateLinkServiceConnectionState.status)
| where stateEnum == 'Disconnected'
| summarize count_ = count() by type
| extend count_ = iff(count_ == 0, 0, count_)
| union (datatable(type:string, count_:long) ["microsoft.network/privateendpoints", 0])
| summarize total_count = max(count_) by type

resources
| where type =~ 'microsoft.network/virtualnetworkgateways'
| where resourceGroup in~ ({ResourceGroup:value})
| extend vpnClientConfiguration = properties.vpnClientConfiguration
| extend Resource = id
| join kind=leftouter (
  resources
  | where type =~ 'microsoft.network/connections'
  | mv-expand Resource = pack_array(properties.virtualNetworkGateway1.id, properties.virtualNetworkGateway2.id) to typeof(string)
  | project Resource, connectionId = id, ConnectionProperties=properties
 ) on Resource
| where isempty(vpnClientConfiguration) and isempty(connectionId)
| summarize count_ = count() by type
| extend count_ = iff(count_ == 0, 0, count_)
| union (datatable(type:string, count_:long) ["microsoft.network/virtualnetworkgateways", 0])
| summarize total_count = max(count_) by type

resources
| where type =~ 'microsoft.network/ddosprotectionplans'
| where resourceGroup in~ ({ResourceGroup:value})
| where isnull(properties.virtualNetworks)
| summarize count_ = count() by type
| extend count_ = iff(count_ == 0, 0, count_)
| union (datatable(type:string, count_:long) ["microsoft.network/ddosprotectionplans", 0])
| summarize total_count = max(count_) by type

ResourceContainers
| where type =~ 'microsoft.resources/subscriptions/resourcegroups'
| extend rgAndSub = strcat(resourceGroup, "--", subscriptionId)
| join kind=leftouter (Resources | extend rgAndSub = strcat(resourceGroup, "--", subscriptionId) | summarize count() by rgAndSub) on rgAndSub
| where isnull(count_)
| summarize count_ = count() by type
| extend count_ = iff(count_ == 0, 0, count_)
| union (datatable(type:string, count_:long) ["microsoft.resources/subscriptions/resourcegroups", 0])
| summarize total_count = max(count_) by type

AzureDiagnostics
| where ResourceProvider == "MICROSOFT.LOGIC"
| where OperationName == "Microsoft.Logic/workflows/workflowRunCompleted"
| where TimeGenerated > ago(730d)
| where resource_resourceGroupName_s in~ ({ResourceGroup:value})
| extend workflowName = tostring(resource_workflowName_s)
| summarize LastRun = max(TimeGenerated) by workflowName
| where LastRun < ago(30d)
| summarize count_ = count()
| extend type = "Logic Apps", total_count = count_
| project type, total_count

resources
| where type =~ 'microsoft.web/certificates'
| where resourceGroup in~ ({ResourceGroup:value})
| extend expiresOn = todatetime(properties.expirationDate)
| where expiresOn <= now()
| summarize count_ = count() by type
| extend count_ = iff(count_ == 0, 0, count_)
| union (datatable(type:string, count_:long) ["microsoft.web/certificates", 0])
| summarize total_count = max(count_) by type

content.json:
## Forsaken Resource Age

Every resource shown here is confirmed forsaken using the exact same detection logic as the Overview tiles. Sorted by age descending so the longest-sitting resources are at the top.

💲 marks resource types that continue to generate charges even when forsaken.

content.query:
Resources
| where resourceGroup in~ ({ResourceGroup:value})
| where type in~ ('microsoft.web/serverfarms', 'microsoft.compute/availabilitysets', 'microsoft.compute/disks', 'microsoft.network/publicipaddresses', 'microsoft.network/networkinterfaces')
| where (type == 'microsoft.web/serverfarms' and properties.numberOfSites == 0)
   or (type == 'microsoft.compute/availabilitysets' and properties.virtualMachines == '[]' and name !endswith '-asr')
   or (type == 'microsoft.compute/disks' and ((managedBy == '' and tostring(properties.diskState) != 'ActiveSAS') or (tostring(properties.diskState) == 'Unattached' and tostring(properties.diskState) != 'ActiveSAS')) and name !endswith '-ASRReplica' and name !startswith 'ms-asr-' and name !startswith 'asrseeddisk-' and tags !contains 'kubernetes.io-created-for-pvc' and tags !contains 'ASR-ReplicaDisk' and tags !contains 'asrseeddisk' and tags !contains 'RSVaultBackup')
   or (type == 'microsoft.network/publicipaddresses' and properties.ipConfiguration == '' and properties.natGateway == '' and properties.publicIPPrefix == '')
   or (type == 'microsoft.network/networkinterfaces' and isnull(properties.privateEndpoint) and isnull(properties.privateLinkService) and properties.hostedWorkloads == '[]' and properties !has 'virtualmachine')
| extend createdTime = todatetime(properties.timeCreated)
| extend ['Age (Days)'] = iff(isnull(createdTime), int(null), datetime_diff('day', now(), createdTime))
| extend ['Age Category'] = case(isnull(['Age (Days)']), '🔍 Needs Manual Review (no timeCreated)', ['Age (Days)'] > 90, '🔴 Over 90 days', ['Age (Days)'] > 30, '🟠 30 to 90 days', '🟡 Under 30 days')
| project ['Resource Name']=name, ['Resource Type']=type, ['Resource Group']=resourceGroup, Location=location, ['Age (Days)'], ['Age Category'], subscriptionId, ['Resource ID']=id
| order by ['Age (Days)'] desc
content.title: App Service Plans | Availability Sets | Disks | Public IPs | NICs
content.noDataMessage: No forsaken resources found for these types.

content.json:
## Estimated Monthly Cost Impact

Shows only resource types that carry a direct charge when unused. Monthly waste is calculated by multiplying the forsaken count by the unit cost.

Prices reflect actual Azure pay-as-you-go rates per SKU (UK South). Resources with unrecognised SKUs fall back to the nearest common tier estimate.

content.query:
resources
| where type =~ 'microsoft.web/serverfarms'
| where resourceGroup in~ ({ResourceGroup:value})
| where properties.numberOfSites == 0
| extend skuName = tostring(sku.name)
| extend skuTier = tostring(sku.tier)
| extend UnitCost = 
    case(
        skuTier == "PremiumV3" and skuName == "P1v3", 184.16,
        skuTier == "PremiumV3" and skuName == "P2v3", 368.32,
        skuTier == "PremiumV3" and skuName == "P3v3", 736.64,
        skuTier == "PremiumV2" and skuName == "P1v2", 138.26,
        skuTier == "PremiumV2" and skuName == "P2v2", 276.52,
        skuTier == "PremiumV2" and skuName == "P3v2", 553.03,
        skuTier == "Standard" and skuName == "S1", 69.13,
        skuTier == "Standard" and skuName == "S2", 138.26,
        skuTier == "Standard" and skuName == "S3", 276.52,
        skuTier == "Basic" and skuName == "B1", 51.98,
        skuTier == "Basic" and skuName == "B2", 103.97,
        skuTier == "Basic" and skuName == "B3", 207.39,
        skuTier == "IsolatedV2" and skuName == "I1v2", 312.46,
        skuTier == "IsolatedV2" and skuName == "I2v2", 624.92,
        skuTier == "IsolatedV2" and skuName == "I3v2", 1250.00,
        skuTier == "Isolated" and skuName == "I1", 312.46,
        skuTier == "Isolated" and skuName == "I2", 624.92,
        skuTier == "Isolated" and skuName == "I3", 1250.00,
        skuTier == "FlexConsumption", 0.00,
        69.13  // Default fallback
    )
| extend Basis = strcat("App Service Plan - ", skuTier, "/", skuName)
| summarize ForsakenCount = count(), UnitCost = any(UnitCost), Basis = any(Basis)
| extend rtype = "microsoft.web/serverfarms"
| union(
    resources
    | where type =~ 'microsoft.compute/disks'
    | where resourceGroup in~ ({ResourceGroup:value})
    | extend diskState = tostring(properties.diskState)
    | where (managedBy == "" and diskState != 'ActiveSAS') or (diskState == 'Unattached' and diskState != 'ActiveSAS')
    | where not(name endswith '-ASRReplica' or name startswith 'ms-asr-' or name startswith 'asrseeddisk-')
    | where (tags !contains 'kubernetes.io-created-for-pvc') and tags !contains 'ASR-ReplicaDisk' and tags !contains 'asrseeddisk' and tags !contains 'RSVaultBackup'
    | extend diskTier = tostring(properties.tier)
    | extend diskSizeGB = toint(properties.diskSizeGB)
    | extend UnitCost = 
        case(
            diskTier == "P1",  0.57,
            diskTier == "P2",  1.14,
            diskTier == "P3",  2.27,
            diskTier == "P4",  4.84,
            diskTier == "P6",  9.36,
            diskTier == "P10", 18.07,
            diskTier == "P15", 34.85,
            diskTier == "P20", 67.12,
            diskTier == "P30", 123.90,
            diskTier == "P40", 237.45,
            diskTier == "P50", 454.25,
            diskTier == "E1",  0.25,
            diskTier == "E2",  0.50,
            diskTier == "E3",  1.00,
            diskTier == "E4",  2.00,
            diskTier == "E6",  4.00,
            diskTier == "E10", 8.00,
            diskTier == "E15", 16.00,
            diskTier == "E20", 32.00,
            diskTier == "E30", 64.00,
            diskTier == "E40", 128.00,
            diskTier == "E50", 256.00,
            diskTier == "S10", 4.91,
            diskTier == "S15", 9.44,
            diskTier == "S20", 18.14,
            diskTier == "S30", 34.14,
            diskTier == "S40", 64.85,
            diskTier == "S50", 119.45,
            18.07  // Default fallback (P10 equivalent)
        )
    | extend Basis = strcat("Disk - ", diskTier, " (", tostring(diskSizeGB), "GB)")
    | summarize ForsakenCount = count(), UnitCost = any(UnitCost), Basis = any(Basis)
    | extend rtype = "microsoft.compute/disks"
)
| union(
    resources
    | where type =~ 'microsoft.network/publicipaddresses'
    | where resourceGroup in~ ({ResourceGroup:value})
    | where properties.ipConfiguration == "" and properties.natGateway == "" and properties.publicIPPrefix == ""
    | extend skuTier = tostring(sku.tier)
    | extend UnitCost = iff(skuTier == "Standard", 2.77, iff(skuTier == "Basic", 1.99, 2.77))
    | extend Basis = strcat("Public IP - ", skuTier)
    | summarize ForsakenCount = count(), UnitCost = any(UnitCost), Basis = any(Basis)
    | extend rtype = "microsoft.network/publicipaddresses"
)
| union(
    resources
    | where type =~ 'microsoft.network/loadbalancers'
    | where resourceGroup in~ ({ResourceGroup:value})
    | where properties.backendAddressPools == "[]" and properties.inboundNatRules == "[]" and properties.outboundRules == "[]"
    | extend skuName = tostring(sku.name)
    | extend UnitCost = iff(skuName == "Standard", 13.83, iff(skuName == "Basic", 0.00, 13.83))
    | extend Basis = strcat("Load Balancer - ", skuName)
    | summarize ForsakenCount = count(), UnitCost = any(UnitCost), Basis = any(Basis)
    | extend rtype = "microsoft.network/loadbalancers"
)
| union(
    resources
    | where type =~ 'microsoft.network/natgateways'
    | where resourceGroup in~ ({ResourceGroup:value})
    | where isnull(properties.subnets)
    | extend UnitCost = 24.89
    | extend Basis = "NAT Gateway (Standard) - UK South"
    | summarize ForsakenCount = count(), UnitCost = any(UnitCost), Basis = any(Basis)
    | extend rtype = "microsoft.network/natgateways"
)
| union(
    resources
    | where type =~ 'microsoft.network/privatednszones'
    | where resourceGroup in~ ({ResourceGroup:value})
    | where properties.numberOfVirtualNetworkLinks == 0
    | extend UnitCost = 0.38
    | extend Basis = "Private DNS Zone"
    | summarize ForsakenCount = count(), UnitCost = any(UnitCost), Basis = any(Basis)
    | extend rtype = "microsoft.network/privatednszones"
)
| extend MonthlyWaste = todouble(ForsakenCount) * todouble(UnitCost)
| where ForsakenCount > 0
| project 
    ["Resource Type"] = rtype,
    ["Forsaken Count"] = ForsakenCount,
    ["Unit Cost GBP/mo"] = UnitCost,
    ["Est Monthly Waste GBP"] = MonthlyWaste,
    ["Pricing Basis"] = Basis
| order by ["Est Monthly Waste GBP"] desc
content.title: Monthly Waste Estimate (Part 1)

content.query:
resources
| where type =~ 'microsoft.network/privateendpoints'
| where resourceGroup in~ ({ResourceGroup:value})
| extend connection = iff(array_length(properties.manualPrivateLinkServiceConnections) > 0, properties.manualPrivateLinkServiceConnections[0], properties.privateLinkServiceConnections[0])
| extend stateEnum = tostring(connection.properties.privateLinkServiceConnectionState.status)
| where stateEnum == 'Disconnected'
| summarize ForsakenCount = count()
| extend rtype = 'microsoft.network/privateendpoints'
| extend UnitCost = 7.30
| extend Basis = 'Private Endpoint (Standard) - UK South'
| union (
    resources
    | where type =~ 'microsoft.network/virtualnetworkgateways'
    | where resourceGroup in~ ({ResourceGroup:value})
    | extend vpnClientConfiguration = properties.vpnClientConfiguration
    | extend skuName = tostring(properties.sku.name)
    | extend Resource = id
    | join kind=leftouter (
        resources
        | where type =~ 'microsoft.network/connections'
        | mv-expand Resource = pack_array(properties.virtualNetworkGateway1.id, properties.virtualNetworkGateway2.id) to typeof(string)
        | project Resource, connectionId = id
    ) on Resource
    | where isempty(vpnClientConfiguration) and isempty(connectionId)
    | extend UnitCost = case(
        skuName == "VpnGw1",    138.70,
        skuName == "VpnGw2",    357.70,
        skuName == "VpnGw3",    912.50,
        skuName == "VpnGw4",    1533.00,
        skuName == "VpnGw5",    2664.50,
        skuName == "VpnGw1AZ",  153.30,
        skuName == "VpnGw2AZ",  394.20,
        skuName == "VpnGw3AZ",  1007.40,
        skuName == "Basic",     26.28,
        138.70  // fallback
    )
    | extend Basis = strcat("VPN Gateway - ", skuName, " (UK South)")
    | summarize ForsakenCount = count(), UnitCost = any(UnitCost), Basis = any(Basis)
    | extend rtype = 'microsoft.network/virtualnetworkgateways'
)
| union (
    resources
    | where type =~ 'microsoft.network/applicationgateways'
    | where resourceGroup in~ ({ResourceGroup:value})
    | extend SKUName = tostring(properties.sku.name)
    | extend SKUTier = tostring(properties.sku.tier)
    | extend AppGwId = tostring(id)
    | project AppGwId, name, SKUName, SKUTier, type
    | join (
        resources
        | where type =~ 'microsoft.network/applicationgateways'
        | mvexpand backendPools = properties.backendAddressPools
        | extend backendIPCount = array_length(backendPools.properties.backendIPConfigurations)
        | extend backendAddressesCount = array_length(backendPools.properties.backendAddresses)
        | extend AppGwId = tostring(id)
        | summarize backendIPCount = sum(backendIPCount), backendAddressesCount = sum(backendAddressesCount) by AppGwId
    ) on AppGwId
    | project-away AppGwId1
    | where (backendIPCount == 0 or isempty(backendIPCount)) and (backendAddressesCount == 0 or isempty(backendAddressesCount))
    | extend UnitCost = case(
        SKUTier == "WAF_v2",        328.50,  // $0.45/hr * 730h
        SKUTier == "Standard_v2",   182.50,  // $0.25/hr * 730h
        SKUTier == "WAF" and SKUName has "Large",   402.89,  // V1 WAF Large $0.5519/hr * 730h (RETIRED Apr 2026)
        SKUTier == "WAF" and SKUName has "Medium",  113.30,  // V1 WAF Medium $0.1552/hr * 730h (RETIRED)
        SKUTier == "Standard" and SKUName has "Large",   287.77,  // V1 Standard Large $0.3942/hr * 730h (RETIRED)
        SKUTier == "Standard" and SKUName has "Medium",   62.93,  // V1 Standard Medium $0.0862/hr * 730h (RETIRED)
        328.50  // fallback WAF_v2
    )
    | extend Basis = strcat("Application Gateway - ", SKUTier, "/", SKUName, " (UK South)")
    | summarize ForsakenCount = count(), UnitCost = any(UnitCost), Basis = any(Basis)
    | extend rtype = 'microsoft.network/applicationgateways'
)
| extend MonthlyWaste = toreal(ForsakenCount) * UnitCost
| where ForsakenCount > 0
| project 
    ['Resource Type'] = rtype,
    ['Forsaken Count'] = ForsakenCount,
    ['Unit Cost USD/mo'] = UnitCost,
    ['Est Monthly Waste USD'] = MonthlyWaste,
    ['Pricing Basis'] = Basis
| order by ['Est Monthly Waste USD'] desc

content.json: # Storage Accounts for Review

**⚠️ IMPORTANT - READ BEFORE DELETING**

Storage Accounts listed here are older than 90 days. **This does NOT automatically mean they are unused.**

**To verify if a storage account is truly abandoned:**
1. Enable **Diagnostic Settings** for the storage account
2. Check these log tables in Log Analytics:
   - `StorageBlobLogs` - for blob container activity
   - `StorageFileLogs` - for file share access  
   - `StorageQueueLogs` - for queue operations
   - `StorageTableLogs` - for table storage queries

**🔍 Example StorageFileLogs entry:**
```
OperationName: ListShares | StatusCode: 200 | AuthenticationType: TrustedAccess | CallerIpAddress
```

**Safe deletion approach:**
- If **no logs exist** for 30+ days → likely unused (but still verify metrics)
- If **logs show activity** → DO NOT DELETE
- When in doubt, keep the storage account

💡 **Note:** Even "empty" storage accounts may be used for infrastructure-as-code state files (Terraform), diagnostic logs, or backup metadata.

content.query:
resources
| where type =~ 'microsoft.storage/storageaccounts'
| where resourceGroup in~ ({ResourceGroup:value})
| extend createdTime=todatetime(properties.creationTime)
| extend AgeDays=iff(isnull(createdTime),int(null),datetime_diff('day',now(),createdTime))
| where AgeDays > 90
| project subscriptionId, Resource=id, resourceGroup, location, Kind=kind, SKU=tostring(sku.name), ['Access Tier']=tostring(properties.accessTier), ['Age Days']=AgeDays, Details=pack_all()
content.title: Storage Accounts (Created 90+ days ago)

| project-away databaseCount
| project subscriptionId, Resource, resourceGroup, location, tags, Details

content.json:
## Forsaken Network Resources

All unattached and unassociated network resources in a single view. Grouped by resource type.

💲 marks resources that continue to generate charges even when forsaken.

content.query:
Resources
| where resourceGroup in~ ({ResourceGroup:value})
| where type in~ (
    'microsoft.network/publicipaddresses',
    'microsoft.network/networkinterfaces',
    'microsoft.network/networksecuritygroups',
    'microsoft.network/routetables',
    'microsoft.network/loadbalancers')
| extend isForsaken = case(
    type =~ 'microsoft.network/publicipaddresses',
        iff(properties.ipConfiguration == '' and properties.natGateway == '' and properties.publicIPPrefix == '', true, false),
    type =~ 'microsoft.network/networkinterfaces',
        iff(isnull(properties.privateEndpoint) and isnull(properties.privateLinkService) and properties.hostedWorkloads == '[]' and properties !has 'virtualmachine', true, false),
    type =~ 'microsoft.network/networksecuritygroups',
        iff(isnull(properties.networkInterfaces) and isnull(properties.subnets), true, false),
    type =~ 'microsoft.network/routetables',
        iff(isnull(properties.subnets), true, false),
    type =~ 'microsoft.network/loadbalancers',
        iff(properties.backendAddressPools == '[]' and properties.inboundNatRules == '[]' and properties.outboundRules == '[]', true, false),
    false)
| where isForsaken == true
| extend Billable = case(
    type =~ 'microsoft.network/publicipaddresses', '💲 Yes',
    type =~ 'microsoft.network/loadbalancers', '💲 Yes',
    'No')
| extend Details = pack_all()
| project subscriptionId, Resource=id, ['Resource Type']=type, resourceGroup, location, Billable, Details
content.title: Public IPs | NICs | NSGs | Route Tables | Load Balancers

content.json:
# Logic Apps - Last Run Activity

Shows all Logic Apps with their last execution time. Logic Apps with no runs in the last 30 days are considered abandoned.

🔴 **Red status** = No runs in over 30 days - likely abandoned
🟠 **Orange status** = 30-90 days since last run - investigate
🟡 **Yellow status** = 90-365 days since last run - high risk of abandonment
🟢 **Green status** = Active (less than 30 days)

**Note:** Only Logic Apps that have EVER run will appear in this list. Disabled Logic Apps that have never run will not appear. To find truly abandoned Logic Apps, look for those with last run time > 30 days ago.

content.query:
AzureDiagnostics
| where ResourceProvider == "MICROSOFT.LOGIC"
| where OperationName == "Microsoft.Logic/workflows/workflowRunCompleted"
| where TimeGenerated > ago(730d)
| where resource_resourceGroupName_s in~ ({ResourceGroup:value})
| extend workflowName = tostring(resource_workflowName_s)
| summarize LastRun = max(TimeGenerated) by workflowName
| where LastRun < ago(30d)
| summarize count_ = count()
| extend type = "Logic Apps (>30d no run)", total_count = count_
| project type, total_count
content.title: Total (>30 days no run)

content.query:
AzureDiagnostics
| where ResourceProvider == "MICROSOFT.LOGIC"
| where OperationName == "Microsoft.Logic/workflows/workflowRunCompleted"
| where TimeGenerated > ago(730d)
| where resource_resourceGroupName_s in~ ({ResourceGroup:value})
| extend workflowName = tostring(resource_workflowName_s)
| extend Location = tostring(location_s)
| summarize LastRun = max(TimeGenerated) by workflowName, Location
| where LastRun < ago(30d)
| summarize Count = count() by Location
| order by Count desc
content.title: Abandoned Logic Apps by Location

content.query:
AzureDiagnostics
| where ResourceProvider == "MICROSOFT.LOGIC"
| where OperationName == "Microsoft.Logic/workflows/workflowRunCompleted"
| where TimeGenerated > ago(730d)
| where resource_resourceGroupName_s in~ ({ResourceGroup:value})
| extend workflowId = tostring(workflowId_s)
| extend workflowName = tostring(resource_workflowName_s)
| extend ResourceGroup = tostring(resource_resourceGroupName_s)
| extend subscriptionId = tostring(resource_subscriptionId_g)
| extend location = tostring(location_s)
| extend status = tostring(status_s)
| summarize LastRunTime = max(TimeGenerated), TotalRuns = count(), LastStatus = arg_max(TimeGenerated, status) by workflowId, workflowName, ResourceGroup, subscriptionId, location
| extend DaysSinceLastRun = datetime_diff('day', now(), LastRunTime)
| extend Status = case(
    DaysSinceLastRun > 30, "🔴 ABANDONED (>30 days)",
    DaysSinceLastRun > 90, "🟠 INACTIVE (30-90 days)",
    DaysSinceLastRun > 365, "🟡 HIGH RISK (90-365 days)",
    "🟢 ACTIVE (<30 days)")
| project WorkflowName = workflowName, ResourceGroup, Location = location, SubscriptionId = subscriptionId, LastRunTime, DaysSinceLastRun, TotalRuns, LastStatus, Status, WorkflowId = workflowId
| order by DaysSinceLastRun desc
content.title: Logic Apps - Last Run Activity
content.noDataMessage: No Logic Apps found with run history.

content.json: # Expired Certificates
App Service certificates past their expiration date. Expired certs will break HTTPS bindings and should be renewed or deleted.

content.query:

| where expiresOn <= now()
| extend DaysExpired = datetime_diff('day', now(), expiresOn)
| summarize count_ = count() by type
| extend count_ = iff(count_ == 0, 0, count_)
| union (datatable(type:string, count_:long) ["microsoft.web/certificates", 0])
| summarize total_count = max(count_) by type

content.json: # App Gateways Empty Backend
Application Gateways with no backends and no backend IP configurations. Minimum WAF_v2 cost is ~$250/month.

content.query:
resources
| where type =~ 'microsoft.network/applicationgateways'
| where resourceGroup in~ ({ResourceGroup:value})
| extend AppGwId = tostring(id)
| project AppGwId, type
| join (
    resources
    | where type =~ 'microsoft.network/applicationgateways'
    | mv-expand backendPools = properties.backendAddressPools
    | extend backendIPCount = array_length(backendPools.properties.backendIPConfigurations)
    | extend backendAddressesCount = array_length(backendPools.properties.backendAddresses)
    | extend AppGwId = tostring(id)
    | summarize backendIPCount = sum(backendIPCount), backendAddressesCount = sum(backendAddressesCount) by AppGwId
) on AppGwId
| project-away AppGwId1
| where (backendIPCount == 0 or isempty(backendIPCount)) and (backendAddressesCount == 0 or isempty(backendAddressesCount))
| summarize count_ = count() by type
| extend count_ = iff(count_ == 0, 0, count_)
| union (datatable(type:string, count_:long) ["microsoft.network/applicationgateways", 0])
| summarize total_count = max(count_) by type
content.title: Total

| project AppGwId, name, SKUName, SKUTier, SKUCapacity, type, subscriptionId, resourceGroup, location, tags
| join (
